response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with a strong background in C and C++ from National Instruments. However, his recent roles have primarily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with limited exposure to modern C++ development for industrial automation, cloud platforms, or secure engineering practices like IEC 62443. His lack of recent C++ experience and no clear mention of industrial automation or cybersecurity standards raise concerns for this role.
strengths: Solid foundational knowledge in C and C++ from National Instruments experience
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated through diverse project work
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last C++ role was in 2015)
No visible experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Lacks demonstrated experience with secure development lifecycles (IEC 62443) or cloud platforms
